event_name: ENISA Telecom and Digital Infrastructure Security Forum 2026
description: ENISA's annual forum on telecoms and digital infrastructure security, co-organised with the Cyprus Presidency of the EU Council. Brings together regulators, operators and policymakers to discuss security of Europe's communications networks.

event_name: CyCon 2026 – 18th International Conference on Cyber Conflict: Securing Tomorrow
organiser: NATO CCDCOE (Cooperative Cyber Defence Centre of Excellence)
description: The flagship annual academic-military cyber conference bringing together 600+ decision-makers, legal experts, technologists and military representatives from nearly 50 countries to address cyber conflict, cyber defence, and international law in cyberspace.

Europe's leading information security event, held at ExCeL London, gathering thousands of cybersecurity professionals, vendors, and thought leaders to explore the latest threats, technologies, and strategies in information security.

organiser: European Commission – DG ECHO (Directorate-General for European Civil Protection and Humanitarian Aid Operations)
description: The 9th edition of the flagship EU Civil Protection Forum, held at Tour & Taxis Brussels, focusing on strengthening preparedness in a complex risk landscape aligned with the EU Preparedness Union Strategy, covering partnerships, evolving risks, and research and innovation.

Europe's largest dedicated IT security trade fair, drawing over 20,000 security professionals and 700 exhibitors, covering cloud and cyber security, data and network security, mobile security and compliance solutions.

organiser: Comexposium / French Ministry of the Interior
description: The world's leading biennial homeland security and public safety trade show, organised under the aegis of the French Ministry of the Interior, featuring 1,000+ exhibitors from 40+ countries across civil protection, major risk management, and security technology sectors.

The 11th edition of Europe's premier critical infrastructure protection conference, bringing together infrastructure operators, government agencies, industry, and researchers to collaborate on risk management, CER and NIS2 Directive implementation, and resilient operations.

The go-to international security event held at Olympia London, connecting 10,000+ professionals in government, industry and academia working on critical national infrastructure protection, counter-terrorism, homeland security, and physical and cyber security.

Europe's leading energy transition conference and exhibition, featuring 15,000+ attendees and 700+ exhibitors from 140 countries, covering power generation, smart energy systems, cybersecurity, digitalisation, and energy market developments.

Europe's leading annual event on digital security and trust, organised by Forward Global under the High Patronage of the President of the French Republic, bringing together 700+ exhibitors and 20,000+ visitors for 200+ conferences on cybersecurity strategy, innovation, and policy.

The 19th edition of Europe's flagship annual cybersecurity and digital trust event at Lille Grand Palais, covering cybersecurity strategy, regulatory compliance, emerging threats, and digital sovereignty with exhibitors and conferences from across the European ecosystem.

The UK government's flagship annual cybersecurity event, marking NCSC's 10th anniversary, bringing together 2,500+ cyber security leaders and technical professionals across tracks covering resilience, technology, threat intelligence, and the cyber ecosystem.

The Benelux's largest cybersecurity event at Brussels Expo, focusing on NIS2 and EU AI Act compliance, digital sovereignty, cyber warfare, supply chain security, and resilience, with keynotes, technical sessions, and awards.

organiser: ENISA (EU Agency for Cybersecurity) / Cyprus Presidency
description: ENISA's annual conference on the EU Cybersecurity Certification Framework, covering progress on certification schemes including the EUDI Wallet and CRA, harmonised ICT supply chain risk management, and the proposed Cybersecurity Act 2.

The 10th anniversary cybersecurity standardisation conference co-organised by ENISA and European Standardisation Organisations CEN, CENELEC and ETSI, examining EU standardisation for the Cyber Resilience Act, legislative landscape, and the future of European cybersecurity standards.

organiser: ENISA / Digital Security Authority of Cyprus
description: The 4th annual European Cybersecurity Skills Conference, bringing together policymakers, training providers, and cybersecurity professionals to exchange experiences and share best practices in building EU cybersecurity workforce skills and competencies.

Europe's flagship cybersecurity competition for young talent hosted in Bochum, with ~500 participants from 35+ national teams competing across web security, reverse engineering, cryptography, binary exploitation and other cybersecurity disciplines.

The world's largest and most complex annual live-fire cyber defence exercise, expected to involve ~4,000 participants from 40 nations defending national systems and critical infrastructure against realistic cyber attack scenarios.

The 8th edition of ENISA's pan-European cybersecurity exercise series, designed to strengthen the cyber preparedness of EU critical infrastructure operators and national authorities through realistic large-scale incident simulations.

event_name: EU Military Crisis Management Exercise MILEX 26
organiser: European External Action Service (EEAS) / EU Military Staff
description: The EU's annual crisis management military exercise testing readiness and deployment capabilities of the EU Rapid Deployment Capacity (RDC), involving crisis response planning, alert system exercises, and live force deployments by EU member states.

event_name: SANS DFIR Europe Summit and Training 2026
description: SANS Institute's annual European Digital Forensics and Incident Response (DFIR) summit and training event in Prague, offering 8 hands-on courses and a NetWars tournament for cybersecurity practitioners.

SANS Institute's live online cybersecurity training event for European participants, featuring 4 courses and a NetWars tournament delivered by real-world security practitioners with hands-on virtual labs.

International specialised cybersecurity training programme delivering 200+ hours of instruction for law enforcement, CSIRT teams, judiciary and public sector decision-makers, covering cyber incident management and cybercrime response.

organiser: BSI – Federal Office for Information Security (Germany)
description: The BSI's 21st annual IT Security Congress held virtually under the motto 'Cybernation Germany: together, secure, digital', bringing together IT security professionals from government, industry and academia to discuss Germany's cybersecurity posture.

The 12th Cyber Intelligence Europe conference bringing together government, military, and security stakeholders from across Europe to discuss national cybersecurity strategies, cybercrime trends, threat monitoring, critical infrastructure protection, and coordinated EU cyber response.

event_name: IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy 2026 (EuroS&P)
organiser: IEEE Computer Society / Instituto Superior Técnico, Universidade de Lisboa
description: The 11th annual IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy, the premier academic European forum for presenting developments in computer security and electronic privacy research, bringing together leading researchers and practitioners.

organiser: ENCORS / TU Delft / Research Institutions Consortium
description: The inaugural annual European Research Security Conference, bringing together practitioners, policymakers, and institutional leaders from research organisations to address unwanted knowledge transfer, covert influence, and misuse of research results in open research environments.

The Business Continuity Institute's flagship annual hybrid conference at Convene Sancroft, London, covering business continuity, operational resilience, crisis management, and emerging regulatory requirements for resilience professionals worldwide.

event_name: BCI Operational Resilience Report 2026 – EMEA Launch Webinar
description: The BCI's EMEA launch webinar for the Operational Resilience Report 2026, presenting findings on how organisations define operational resilience, governance structures, third-party dependencies, and evolving global resilience regulations.

France's biennial trade fair for risk prevention and management at Paris Expo Porte de Versailles, featuring 800+ exhibitors covering occupational safety, fire protection, crisis planning, climate risk adaptation, physical security, and business continuity solutions.

A two-day summit at County Hall uniting government, industry and civil society leaders to advance digital sovereignty, cyber resilience, and critical infrastructure protection, with a focus on public-private coordination and strategic response to emerging threats.

event_name: 7th International Conference on EU Cyber Security and Resilience Acts
description: The only global forum entirely focused on EU cyber compliance, bringing together ICT product developers, compliance leaders, and regulators from 27+ countries to address the Cyber Resilience Act, NIS2, and related EU cybersecurity legislation.

The annual EENA conference and exhibition gathering 700+ emergency services professionals and 25+ exhibitors from 50+ countries to address emergency response optimisation, next-generation 112/emergency communication technologies, and crisis management strategies.

organiser: Health-ISAC (Health Information Sharing and Analysis Center)
description: The annual Health-ISAC European Summit bringing together health sector security professionals to share threat intelligence, cyber and physical security best practices, and coordinated response strategies for the healthcare critical infrastructure sector.

The world's largest biennial defence and security exhibition at ExCeL London, connecting global defence and security supply chains across land, sea, air and cyber domains with government, military, and industry leaders.

Germany's growing annual cybersecurity conference and trade fair for IT security, bringing together 1,000+ CISOs, security leaders, SOC teams, and compliance professionals to explore current threats, best practices, and strategies for SMEs to large enterprises.

The 2027 edition of Germany's annual cybersecurity summit and expo, targeting IT security decision-makers from SMEs to large corporations with sessions on cyber threats, compliance, and emerging security technologies.

organiser: ENISA / European Commission / EU Member States
description: The annual EU-wide cybersecurity awareness campaign coordinated by ENISA and the European Commission throughout October, featuring hundreds of events including conferences, workshops, training sessions, and webinars across Europe promoting cyber hygiene and digital security awareness.

organiser: ENISA / European Commission / EU Member States
description: The 2027 edition of the annual EU-wide cybersecurity awareness campaign featuring hundreds of events across member states, covering digital security, cyber hygiene, and public and professional cybersecurity awareness.

event_name: Third Party & Supply Chain Cyber Security Summit Europe 2026
description: A focused European cybersecurity summit addressing third-party and supply chain risks, covering NIS2/DORA/EU AI Act regulatory readiness, continuous monitoring, OT/ICS supply chain security, and end-to-end risk management frameworks.

Annual conference bringing together CTI specialists from government, critical infrastructure, and private sector organisations to address threat intelligence, nation-state threats, and intelligence-driven defence strategies.

A three-day College of Europe conference in Bruges examining EU defence and security policy, covering European Defence Fund, NATO-EU coordination, and Europe's evolving defence industrial capabilities.

The 2027 Automotive Cyber Security Europe conference in Frankfurt examining emerging threat actors, cybersecurity standards for connected and software-defined vehicles, and supply chain security in the automotive sector.

event_name: Cloud & Cyber Security Expo Europe – Paris 2026
description: Annual European cloud and cybersecurity expo co-located within Tech Show Paris at Paris Expo Porte de Versailles, covering data centre security, cloud security, threat intelligence, application security, and zero trust strategies.

The annual ENISA European Cybersecurity Certification Conference, expected in 2027, covering updates to EU certification schemes, Cybersecurity Act 2 implementation, and harmonised cybersecurity standards for ICT products and services.

event_name: CyCon 2027 – 19th International Conference on Cyber Conflict
description: The 19th annual CyCon multidisciplinary conference on cyber conflict, expected to follow its established format of bringing together 600+ international experts on the technical, legal, policy, strategic, and military dimensions of cyber security and defence.

The 2027 edition of the world's largest and most complex live-fire cyber defence exercise, expected to involve thousands of participants from 40+ nations defending critical infrastructure against realistic attack scenarios.

The 2027 edition of Europe's largest dedicated IT security trade fair, expected in October in Nuremberg, covering cloud security, cyber security, data and network security for 20,000+ security professionals.

event_name: CIPRE 2027 – Critical Infrastructure Protection & Resilience Europe
description: The 2027 edition of Europe's premier annual critical infrastructure protection conference, continuing the focus on CER Directive and NIS2 implementation, cyber-physical risk management, and resilience across European infrastructure sectors.

event_name: ENISA Telecom and Digital Infrastructure Security Forum 2027
description: The expected 2027 edition of ENISA's annual forum on telecom and digital infrastructure security, covering regulatory updates, incident reporting, and best practices for securing European communications infrastructure.
The 2027 edition of BCI's annual flagship hybrid conference on business continuity, operational resilience, and crisis management, expected to continue the established format at a London venue.

The 2027 edition of Europe's leading energy transition conference and exhibition, expected to continue its coverage of smart energy systems, grid cybersecurity, energy market digitalisation, and decarbonisation technologies.

The 2027 edition of the International Security Expo at Olympia London, expected to continue its focus on physical and cyber security, counter-terrorism, critical national infrastructure protection, and homeland security solutions.

The 2027 edition of Europe's flagship young talent cybersecurity competition, expected to involve 35+ national teams from across Europe competing across multiple cybersecurity disciplines over five days.

The 2027 edition of the Health-ISAC European Summit, expected to continue bringing together health sector cyber and physical security professionals to share intelligence and best practices for healthcare critical infrastructure.

ENISA runs pan-European cyber exercises on a biennial cycle; preparatory exercises and tabletop elements for the next Cyber Europe cycle are expected in 2027, maintaining EU critical infrastructure cyber preparedness.

SANS Institute's live online cybersecurity training event for European professionals, featuring 4 hands-on courses and a NetWars tournament covering incident response, forensics, penetration testing, and security operations.

BCI's annual awareness week featuring webinars, chapter meetings, and knowledge-sharing sessions for business continuity and resilience professionals across Europe and beyond, promoting best practices and the value of organisational resilience.

event_name: EU Cybersecurity Skills Academy – Industry-Academia Network Events 2026
description: The EU Cybersecurity Skills Academy's ongoing programme of training, workshops, masterclasses, and academic-industry collaboration events across Europe, aiming to bridge the cybersecurity skills gap through coordinated upskilling and reskilling initiatives.

The 2027 edition of the Benelux's largest cybersecurity event at Brussels Expo, expected to continue covering NIS2 compliance, digital sovereignty, EU AI Act, cyber resilience, and the evolving European cybersecurity regulatory landscape.

event_name: ExpoProtection 2028 / Cloud & Cyber Security Expo Europe 2027
description: Annual Cloud & Cyber Security Expo Europe in Paris covering cloud security, data protection, threat intelligence, and zero trust strategies, co-located with Big Data & AI World within the Tech Show Paris umbrella event.

The 2nd edition of ENCORS, the annual European Research Security Conference for practitioners, policymakers and institutional leaders exploring how to protect open research from unwanted knowledge transfer, covert influence and misuse.

The annual NIS-2 Congress examining practical NIS2 Directive implementation, covering incident management, cyber threat intelligence as a management tool, business continuity, zero trust architecture, and AI-enhanced threat detection for NIS2 compliance.

event_name: MILEX 27 – EU Crisis Management Military Exercise
organiser: European External Action Service (EEAS) / EU Military Staff
description: The 2027 edition of the EU's annual crisis management military exercise, expected to continue testing readiness and deployment capabilities of the EU Rapid Deployment Capacity with participation from EU member states.

The 2027 edition of the EENA annual conference gathering emergency services professionals to address next-generation emergency communication technologies, crisis management strategies, and public safety technology innovation.

The 2027 edition of INCIBE's annual intensive international cybersecurity training programme in León, targeting law enforcement, CSIRT teams, judiciary, and public sector decision-makers with 200+ hours of specialised instruction.

event_name: 9th European Civil Protection Forum – Follow-up / ECPP 2027 Cycle
description: Expected follow-on activities and potential 10th Civil Protection Forum in 2027, continuing EU civil protection capacity building, preparedness policy development, and community knowledge exchange under the EU Civil Protection Mechanism.

event_name: IEEE EuroS&P 2027 – European Symposium on Security and Privacy
description: The 2027 edition of the annual IEEE European Symposium on Security and Privacy, presenting cutting-edge research in computer security and electronic privacy, expected to continue in a European city following the established rotation.

The 2027 edition of the NCSC's flagship annual UK government cybersecurity conference, expected to continue bringing together 2,500+ cyber security leaders and technical professionals for the next iteration of its annual agenda.
